title: MCP get_status reports ready tasks using different rules than core
description: MCP get_status excludes only done, wont_do, and blocked tasks, so it reports in_progress, review, and dependency-blocked tasks as ready. CLI, get_next_task, the index, and reports use readyTasks/isActionable. Affected: src/mcp/server.ts. Fix by reusing readyTasks(tasks).
